description: What do you get when an American bluegrass banjo and an Irish tenor banjo join forces? In the case of Coleraine’s Damien O’Kane and California’s Ron Block – fireworks. Widely regarded as two of the greatest exponents of the banjo, they have collaborated to create arguably their own genre, Banjophony, something never heard before that is subtle, awe-inspiring, energetic and majestic.
title: Damien O'Kane & Ron Block Concert
